result.summary: Found 3 visual issues on this BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, including truncated game cards, cut-off text, and a partially visible navigation item.

issues.description: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off on the right edge, with titles like 'MAGNI...' and 'HYPER...' being truncated mid-word, indicating a horizontal overflow issue.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the carousel or grid container properly constrains card widths, or add visible scroll indicators and padding so users understand content is scrollable. Avoid cutting off card content mid-title.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab in the top filter bar is cut off at the right edge, making the label unreadable and suggesting the horizontal scroll area lacks a clear affordance.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll indicator or fade-out gradient on the right side of the tab bar to communicate scrollability, and ensure tab labels are not abruptly clipped.

issues.description: The third game card column in the exclusive games grid (showing 'MUNC MI...') is partially visible and cut off, which is inconsistent with the two fully visible cards to its left.
issues.suggestion: Apply consistent padding or a peek effect so partial cards are intentionally styled to indicate scrollability, rather than appearing accidentally clipped.
